overall.description: A cinematic first-person walk across a stone bridge toward a massive Gothic gatehouse at night, rendered in a game engine. The camera pauses to observe a burning brazier before proceeding through the archway tunnel toward a second fortified gatehouse in the distance, illuminated by fire and moonlight.

events.description: camera turns right to closely inspect the burning brazier

agents.ego_description: walking steadily across the stone bridge before turning to examine the fire brazier on the right

entered.detail: massive Gothic stone gatehouse with tall vertical columns and crenellated top
stone fire pit with tall orange flames and smoke on the left side of the bridge
stone fire pit with tall orange flames and smoke on the right side of the bridge
wide stone bridge with cobblestone surface and low stone walls
bright full moon visible in the purple night sky

segments.scene_description: The scene opens on a wide stone bridge at night, approaching a massive Gothic gatehouse. Two burning braziers cast warm orange light against the cool purple sky. The camera walks forward then turns right to inspect the fire closely before the segment ends.

events.description: camera turns back to forward facing and continues walking toward the gatehouse
entering the dark stone archway of the outer gatehouse

agents.ego_description: walking directly toward the gatehouse archway, preparing to enter the tunnel

entered.detail: dark arched entrance through the stone gatehouse

segments.scene_description: The camera turns back to face forward and continues approaching the gatehouse. The archway entrance looms larger as the braziers fall behind. The scene transitions from open bridge to the threshold of the dark tunnel.

events.description: entering the dark tunnel, visibility drops to low light
exiting the tunnel, returning to moonlit exterior

agents.ego_description: walking through the dark stone tunnel toward the distant exit and second gatehouse

entered.detail: dark enclosed stone corridor with cobblestone floor
bright exit archway visible at the far end of the tunnel
second fortified gatehouse visible through the tunnel exit
burning fire pit visible on the right side of the inner bridge

segments.scene_description: The camera moves through the dark tunnel where only the distant exit provides light. The inner gatehouse becomes visible through the archway ahead. As the camera emerges, the scene brightens to reveal the inner bridge and its own set of burning braziers.

agents.ego_description: continuing across the inner bridge toward the second fortified gatehouse

entered.detail: stone fire pit with flames on the left side of the inner bridge
continuation of the cobblestone path leading to the inner gatehouse

segments.scene_description: Having exited the tunnel, the camera continues across the inner bridge toward the second gatehouse. Burning braziers line both sides of the path, and the full moon reappears in the sky as the massive inner fortress walls draw closer.

segments_errors: segment[0]: 首段 changed 应为空

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey across a moonlit stone bridge, moving from an outer Gothic gatehouse through a dark tunnel toward a second fortified fortress. It begins by approaching the first gatehouse under a purple night sky, where the camera briefly veers right to inspect the warm orange glow of a burning brazier. As the camera turns back to face forward, the open bridge gives way to the looming threshold of a dark archway. The scene then shifts into the shadows of a tunnel, where the only light is the distant exit that gradually expands to reveal an inner bridge and another set of flickering braziers. Finally, the camera emerges into the moonlight and advances across the inner path, flanked by fire, as the massive walls of the second gatehouse draw closer.
